pr.title: Record: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ (Budget-Legal) + Parallel Muon + Selective Pruning (val_bpb: 1.1178, 3-seed mean)

output.summary: XSA across all 11 layers pairs with Parallel Muon + parameter banking, budget-legal Hessian GPTQ int6, selective pruning, and LZMA compression.
techniques: Full GPTQ int6 with Hessian calibration and amax-aligned QAT
Parallel Muon optimizer with parameter banking for overlapped steps
XSA on every layer plus selective pruning before LZMA
